title: Flutter Mobile Engineer
description:
Lumen Health is building patient-facing mobile apps in Flutter. We need a mobile engineer comfortable shipping cross-platform apps end-to-end: from architecture through API integration to App Store / Play Store releases.

Responsibilities:
- Build and maintain cross-platform mobile applications using Flutter and Dart.
- Apply Clean Architecture and structured state management (BLoC, Cubit, Provider, or GetX).
- Integrate REST APIs and handle authentication, offline caching, and error states.
- Build pixel-perfect, responsive UIs that match Figma designs.
- Implement local persistence (Hive, SQLite, or shared preferences).
- Set up CI/CD for iOS and Android builds (Codemagic or GitHub Actions).
- Collaborate with backend, design, and QA in an agile workflow.

Must-have skills:
- 2+ years of Flutter development.
- Strong Dart and OOP fundamentals.
- Hands-on with at least one state management library (BLoC, Cubit, Provider, GetX).
- REST API integration with HTTP clients (Dio, Retrofit, or http).
- Clean Architecture and feature-folder structuring.
- Git workflows and code review.

Nice to have:
- Native Android (Kotlin) or iOS (Swift) experience.
- Firebase (Auth, Firestore, Cloud Messaging) integration.
- Animations and custom painter work.
- Unit and widget testing in Flutter.
- App Store / Play Store release experience.
